Why Effect DesktopCapabilities

Surfaces

WindowsNative APIsRuntime

Reliability

ErrorsTestingPermissionsDevtools

Permissions

Dangerous operations require explicit, auditable approval.

Process execution, secrets, filesystem writes, external opens, and updates produce auditable decisions.

Permission.ask

Dangerous work is explicit, auditable, and recoverable through typed errors.

Typed denial

Expected failures are values the caller must handle.

Testing

Test desktop behavior without launching a desktop app.

Devtools

Every long-lived thing is visible while the app runs.
